parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source protocol/distribution (e.g. Optimism, Arbitrum DAO, Jupiter).

parameters.name: claimTarget
parameters.description: Distributor mechanism used to deliver this claim.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Address that will receive the claimed tokens.

parameters.name: proof
parameters.description: Merkle inclusion proof; set of 0x-hex sibling hashes. Required for kind = "merkle_distributor".

parameters.name: sig
parameters.description: EIP-712 signature (0x-hex bytes) authorizing the claim. Required for kind = "signature_distributor".

parameters.name: isStillClaimable
parameters.description: ----- Live inputs (flattened from `ClaimAirdropLiveInputs`) ----- Whether the claim is still available (not expired and not already claimed).

parameters.name: actualAmount
parameters.description: Actual claimable amount (U256 hex). Some airdrops are dynamic (e.g. vesting).

parameters.name: actualAmountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: claimToken
parameters.description: Token to be received; some distributions resolve the token dynamically.

parameters.name: claimWindowStart
parameters.description: Start of the optional claim window (unix seconds). Flattened from `LiveField<Option<(Time, Time)>>`; either both bounds are present or both absent.

parameters.name: claimWindowEnd
parameters.description: End of the optional claim window (unix seconds). See `claimWindowStart`.

ClaimTarget.name: chain
ClaimTarget.description: CAIP-2 id of the chain hosting the distributor contract.

ClaimTarget.name: index
ClaimTarget.description: Leaf index in the Merkle tree; present iff kind = "merkle_distributor".

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Governance token whose voting power is being delegated.

parameters.name: delegatee
parameters.description: Address receiving the delegated voting power.

parameters.name: currentDelegate
parameters.description: ----- Live inputs (flattened from `DelegateLiveInputs`) ----- Address currently delegated to. Absent means no current delegate has ever been recorded (most ERC20Votes tokens initialise to zero/self).

parameters.name: votingPower
parameters.description: Current voting power held by the delegator (U256 hex). For balance- backed tokens this is the delegator's token balance.

parameters.name: currentPrice
parameters.description: LiveField<Price>: current pool price (decimal serialized as string), used by policies to validate concentrated-range geometry against the current tick. `pool_state` is reducer-internal and omitted.

RangeSpec.name: tickLower
RangeSpec.description: Tick lower bound (signed). Present iff kind = "tick".

RangeSpec.name: tickUpper
RangeSpec.description: Tick upper bound (signed). Present iff kind = "tick".

RangeSpec.name: liquidity
RangeSpec.description: U128 hex liquidity at mint time. Present iff kind = "tick".

RangeSpec.name: activeId
RangeSpec.description: Active bin id at mint time. Present iff kind = "bin".

RangeSpec.name: protocol
RangeSpec.description: Free-form protocol identifier. Present iff kind = "custom".

AddLiquidityParams.name: tokens
AddLiquidityParams.description: Tokens deposited (set-like; original Vec order lost). Pooled.

AddLiquidityParams.name: minLpOut
AddLiquidityParams.description: Minimum LP tokens out (U256 hex). Pooled.

AddLiquidityParams.name: poolPair
AddLiquidityParams.description: Token pair of the pool. ConcentratedMint.

AddLiquidityParams.name: amountDesired
AddLiquidityParams.description: Desired amounts (a = first of pair, b = second). U256 hex.

AddLiquidityParams.name: amountMin
AddLiquidityParams.description: Minimum acceptable amounts (slippage floor). U256 hex.

AddLiquidityParams.name: range
AddLiquidityParams.description: Tick / bin / custom range for the new position. ConcentratedMint.

AddLiquidityParams.name: recipient
AddLiquidityParams.description: Recipient of LP tokens (Pooled) or position NFT (ConcentratedMint). ConcentratedIncrease has no recipient field (target is the existing NFT).

parameters.name: venue
parameters.description: Intent venue the order was signed against.

parameters.name: signature
parameters.description: EIP-712 signature authorizing the cancellation (0x-hex bytes). Present only for venues that require a separate cancel-sig (e.g. CowSwap off-chain cancel).

parameters.name: nftKey
parameters.description: NFT position key whose fees are being collected.

parameters.name: feesOwed
parameters.description: LiveField<Vec<(TokenRef, U256)>>: fees owed to the position at simulation time (set-like; original Vec order lost).

parameters.name: feesOwed
parameters.description: LiveField<Vec<(TokenRef, U256)>>: fees owed to the position at simulation time (set-like; order lost). `pool_state` is reducer-internal and omitted.

RemoveLiquidityParams.name: lpAmount
RemoveLiquidityParams.description: Amount of LP token to burn (U256 hex). PooledBurn.

RemoveLiquidityParams.name: minOut
RemoveLiquidityParams.description: Minimum acceptable output per underlying token (set-like; original Vec order lost). PooledBurn.

RemoveLiquidityParams.name: recipient
RemoveLiquidityParams.description: Recipient of withdrawn tokens. PooledBurn only; the V3 variants send to the NFT owner / are noop respectively.

RemoveLiquidityParams.name: nftKey
RemoveLiquidityParams.description: NFT position key. ConcentratedDecrease and ConcentratedBurn.

RemoveLiquidityParams.name: liquidityBurn
RemoveLiquidityParams.description: Amount of V3 liquidity to burn (U128 hex). ConcentratedDecrease.

RemoveLiquidityParams.name: amountMin
RemoveLiquidityParams.description: Minimum acceptable amounts (slippage floor). U256 hex. ConcentratedDecrease.

parameters.name: venue
parameters.description: Intent venue receiving the signed order.

parameters.name: sellAmount
parameters.description: Amount of sell token offered (U256 hex).

parameters.name: buyMin
parameters.description: Minimum acceptable amount of buy token (U256 hex).

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Recipient of the buy token when the order fills (Address).

parameters.name: expectedFillPrice
parameters.description: LiveField<Price>: expected fill price at simulation time (decimal serialized as string).

parameters.name: competingOrders
parameters.description: LiveField<u32>: number of active competing orders on the same pair.

parameters.name: slippageBp
parameters.description: Slippage tolerance in basis points, applied across the whole route.

parameters.name: routeEstimatedOut
parameters.description: Sum of estimated_out across all RoutePaths (U256 hex). Route shape (paths × hops) is too complex for Cedar — only the summary is exposed.

parameters.name: expectedAmountOut
parameters.description: LiveField<U256> projection: estimated total output (U256 hex).

parameters.name: priceImpactBp
parameters.description: LiveField<u32>: estimated price impact in basis points.

SwapDirection.name: amountIn
SwapDirection.description: Exact amount of tokenIn sold (U256 hex). Present iff exact_input.

SwapDirection.name: minAmountOut
SwapDirection.description: Minimum acceptable tokenOut (U256 hex). Present iff exact_input.

SwapDirection.name: maxAmountIn
SwapDirection.description: Maximum tokenIn willing to spend (U256 hex). Present iff exact_output.

SwapDirection.name: amountOut
SwapDirection.description: Exact tokenOut to receive (U256 hex). Present iff exact_output.

parameters.name: saleId
parameters.description: Identifier of the sale within the platform.

parameters.name: allocatedToken
parameters.description: ----- Live inputs (flattened from `ClaimAllocationLiveInputs`) ----- Token component of `LiveField<(TokenRef, U256)>`.

parameters.name: allocatedAmountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: refundDue
parameters.description: Refund owed due to oversubscription (U256 hex).

parameters.name: isClaimable
parameters.description: Whether the allocation is currently claimable.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to claim (U256 hex); absent claims the maximum currently available.

parameters.name: claimableNow
parameters.description: ----- Live inputs (flattened from `ClaimVestedLiveInputs`) ----- Amount currently claimable from the vesting schedule (U256 hex).

parameters.name: nextUnlockTime
parameters.description: Next unlock time (unix seconds). Present iff there is a next unlock.

parameters.name: nextUnlockAmount
parameters.description: Next unlock amount (U256 hex). Present iff there is a next unlock.

parameters.name: saleId
parameters.description: Identifier of the sale within the platform.

parameters.name: payToken
parameters.description: Token used to pay into the sale.

parameters.name: amountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Address receiving the resulting allocation/claim rights.

parameters.name: saleState
parameters.description: ----- Live inputs (flattened from `CommitLiveInputs`) ----- Current sale state (cap, window, vest schedule, totals).

parameters.name: userCap
parameters.description: Per-user commit cap enforced by the platform (U256 hex).

parameters.name: userCommitted
parameters.description: Amount already committed by the user (U256 hex).

parameters.name: expectedTokenPrice
parameters.description: Expected sale price (Decimal as string). Optional inside `LiveField<Option<Price>>`.

parameters.name: saleId
parameters.description: Identifier of the sale within the platform.

parameters.name: refundAmount
parameters.description: ----- Live inputs (flattened from `RefundLiveInputs`) ----- Amount eligible to be refunded (U256 hex).

parameters.name: refundAmountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: refundToken
parameters.description: Token of the asset being refunded.

parameters.name: saleId
parameters.description: Identifier of the sale within the platform.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to withdraw (U256 hex); absent withdraws the full committed balance.

parameters.name: withdrawable
parameters.description: ----- Live inputs (flattened from `WithdrawCommitLiveInputs`) ----- Amount currently available to withdraw (U256 hex).

parameters.name: saleState
parameters.description: Current sale state used to verify withdrawal is still permitted.

parameters.name: onBehalfOf
parameters.description: Borrower of record; defaults to submitter when omitted.

parameters.name: assetPriceUsd
parameters.description: Borrow asset price in USD (Price/Decimal as string).

parameters.name: currentBorrowRate
parameters.description: Current borrow rate for the chosen RateMode (Decimal as string).

parameters.name: availableLiquidity
parameters.description: Liquidity available in the reserve for borrowing (U256 hex).

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Asset whose borrow allowance is being delegated.

parameters.name: delegatee
parameters.description: Address being granted the borrow allowance.

parameters.name: rateMode
parameters.description: Rate mode covered by the delegation: "variable" | "stable".

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Asset whose collateral flag is being disabled.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Asset whose collateral flag is being enabled.

parameters.name: debtAsset
parameters.description: Debt asset being repaid by the liquidator.

parameters.name: debtToCover
parameters.description: Debt amount the liquidator covers (U256 hex).

parameters.name: receiveAToken
parameters.description: Aave V3 option — receive seized collateral as aToken instead of underlying.

parameters.name: victimState
parameters.description: Live inputs (flattened from LiveField<T>). Account state of the borrower being liquidated.

parameters.name: debtAssetPrice
parameters.description: Debt asset price in USD (Price/Decimal as string).

parameters.name: collatAssetPrice
parameters.description: Collateral asset price in USD (Price/Decimal as string).

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to repay (U256 hex); U256::MAX = full repay.

parameters.name: rateMode
parameters.description: Rate mode of the debt being repaid: "variable" | "stable".

parameters.name: onBehalfOf
parameters.description: Debtor of record; defaults to submitter when omitted.

parameters.name: useATokens
parameters.description: Aave V3 flag — repay directly using aToken balance.

parameters.name: currentDebt
parameters.description: Current outstanding debt for the chosen RateMode (U256 hex).

parameters.name: amountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: onBehalfOf
parameters.description: Beneficiary; defaults to submitter when omitted.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Asset whose debt rate mode is being switched.

parameters.name: newMode
parameters.description: Target rate mode after the swap: "variable" | "stable".

parameters.name: currentDebtVariable
parameters.description: Live inputs — (variable, stable) tuples flattened to named fields.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to withdraw (U256 hex); U256::MAX = max-withdraw.

parameters.name: availableToWithdraw
parameters.description: Maximum amount the user can withdraw right now (U256 hex).

parameters.name: amountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: amountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: nonce
parameters.description: Current `permit` nonce on the token contract (U256 hex; LiveField inner).

parameters.name: amountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: spender
parameters.description: Address authorized to operate the NFT.

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Chain on which the collection lives (CAIP-2 id).

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Underlying token whose allowance is delegated through `Permit2`.

parameters.name: amountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: expiresAt
parameters.description: Timestamp at which the allowance expires (unix seconds).

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Underlying token whose allowance is delegated through `Permit2`.

parameters.name: amountUsd
parameters.description: USD estimate at submission time. Host-populated.

parameters.name: expiresAt
parameters.description: Timestamp at which the allowance expires (unix seconds).

parameters.name: sigDeadline
parameters.description: Timestamp at which the signature itself expires (unix seconds).

RevokeScope.name: token
RevokeScope.description: Token whose allowance is being revoked (erc20, permit2_lockdown).

RevokeScope.name: spender
RevokeScope.description: Spender losing the allowance (erc20, nft_set_for_all, permit2_lockdown).

RevokeScope.name: chain
RevokeScope.description: Chain on which the collection lives (nft_set_for_all).

parameters.name: calldata
parameters.description: 0x-hex raw calldata (use length-based heuristics in policy)
